16. Should Śani and Rahu be in the 2 from Upa Pad, the native will lose
his wife on account of calumny, or through death.
17. The native‟s wife will be troubled by disorder of blood, leucorrhoea
nd
(Pradar) etc., if Śukr and Ketu are in the 2 from Upa Pad.
nd
18. Budh with Ketu in the 2 from Upa Pad will cause breakage of bones,
while Rahu, Śani and Sūrya will cause distress of bones.
nd
19-22. Budh and Rahu in the 2 from Upa Pad will give a stout-bodied
nd
wife. If the 2 from Upa Pad happens to be one of Budh‟s Rāśis and is
tenanted by Mangal and Śani, the wife of the native will suffer from nasal
nd
disorders. Similarly a Rāśi of Mangal, becoming the 2 from Upa Pad and
